reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar para acampar, tiene de todo. Proveeduria y un predio gigante para estar comodos en la carpa. Tiene pileta y barra de tragos

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful campsite, it has everything you need. A general store and a huge area to comfortably pitch your tent. It also has a pool and a bar.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para acampar o simplemente pasar el dia. Cabañas,  quinchos, piletas y un amplio parque hacen de este lugar un sitio ideal para los niños.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place for camping or simply spending the day. Cabins, barbecue areas, swimming pools, and a large park make this an ideal spot for children.
